name: Pull InsightVM Assets & Vulnerabilities
description: Polls Rapid7 InsightVM for assets and their vulnerability findings, and pushes them as events to Sekoia. Uses differential mode (new / remediated) to minimize data volume.

page_size.description: API page size — max 500 per Rapid7 recommendation

severity_filter.description: Vulnerability severity filter using InsightVM Query Builder syntax. Example: "severity IN ['Critical', 'Severe']". Leave empty to fetch all severities.

include_same.description: Include unchanged vulnerabilities in each polling cycle (increases data volume)
